title.rendered: Echo Park Swan Boats in LA Times California Section

content.rendered:
Date: September 5th, 2025

Echo Park Swan pedal boat rides were featured on the front of the California section in today’s LA Times! These iconic swan boats offer a fun and memorable way to take in the beauty of Echo Park Lake while getting a little light exercise on the water. Each rental lasts one hour, giving you plenty of time to soak in the sunshine, glide past the lotus beds, and enjoy stunning views of the downtown skyline. Pricing is just $13 per adult passenger and $7.50 per child passenger (17 years or younger). Whether you’re planning a family outing, a date, or simply looking for a relaxing adventure outdoors, a swan boat ride is the perfect way to make the most of your day. Come out and enjoy an adventure on the water!

LOS ANGELES SWAN BOAT LOCATIONS:

  • Echo Park, Los Angeles (Reservations are required. Illuminated evening rides are also available. Book at wheelfunretals.com/echo)
  • Lake Balboa, Van Nuys (First come first served. No reservations taken. Daytime rentals only. More info at wheelfunrentals.com/balboa-boats)
  • Rainbow Lagoon, Long Beach  (Reservations are required. Illuminated evening rides are also available. Book at wheelfunrentals.com/rainbow)
